body:
So last April I had a follow up appointment for my surgery that was also discussing the 2nd round of my top surgery/FFS. The doctor who finished up the appointment at the end said he’d get in contact with the other doctor and they would get me scheduled, but they wanted to wait six months after the first round.

Since the surgery was in January, I followed up at the end of July. ￼ and I heard nothing and they told me previously that there was quite a back log because of the change in presidential administration, so I didn’t think much about it.

I still hadn’t heard anything back at the start of the week so I sent a check in since it had been so long.

I got a message back, “What procedure(s) are you still waiting on to be completed? I want to make sure I get you with the right provider.”

So apparently I got lost in the shuffle.

The past few years have felt like I’m stuck in limbo at times. Bottom surgery is still waiting on completing hair removal, so at least I can get a decent feel of when it’s not going to be. But I’ve not wanted to commit to things too far in advance since I didn’t want to back out if there was a surgical opening that conflicted.

The doctor who finished up the appointment at the end said he’d get in contact with the other doctor and they would get me scheduled, but they wanted to wait six months after the first round.

Since the surgery was in January, I followed up at the end of July. ￼ and I heard nothing and they told me previously that there was quite a back log because of the change in presidential administration, so I didn’t think much about it.

I still hadn’t heard anything back at the start of the week so I sent a check in since it had been so long.

I got a message back, “What procedure(s) are you still waiting on to be completed? I want to make sure I get you with the right provider.”

So apparently I got lost in the shuffle.

The past few years have felt like I’m stuck in limbo at times. Bottom surgery is still waiting on completing hair removal, so at least I can get a decent feel of when it’s not going to be. But I’ve not wanted to commit to things too far in advance since I didn’t want to back out if there was a surgical opening that conflicted. I’ve been holding off on working on disability for my eldest since I didn’t want to have to risk recovering from surgery in the middle of that process. 😞
